roles.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built end-to-end automation tests for the authentication service using Playwright, leveraging AI tooling (Gemini CLI) for rapid test generation
Dockerized two production services across all environments (development, staging, production), standardizing deployments and eliminating environment-specific issues

roles.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Completed training on Java, Spring MVC, Spring Boot, clean architecture, and software engineering best practices

Built a full-stack learning platform as the capstone training project with a team of 5 in 2 months — integrated Kafka for messaging, Hazelcast for caching, NGINX as a reverse proxy, a file server, and two Spring Boot backends (Learners and Teachers); presented to leadership
Extracted a tightly coupled shared library from the monolith into an independent authentication microservice, enabling fully isolated builds and deployments
Resolved cross-service bugs across multiple servers, using AI-assisted tooling for accelerated debugging and code analysis

roles.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Single-handedly architected and developed a school management platform using Spring Boot, PostgreSQL (Neon DB), and Next.js with Tailwind CSS
Built an administrative dashboard for teachers to manage students, attendance, and academic records, along with a student portal for accessing grades and resources
Deployed the frontend on Vercel and the backend as a Dockerized service on Render, with CI/CD for seamless releases
Shipped 2 releases; currently finalizing bug fixes ahead of public launch
